nasb.text: Who would not fear You, O King of the nations? Indeed it is Your due! For among all the wise men of the nations And in all their kingdoms, There is none like You.

esv.text: Who would not fear you, O King of the nations? For this is your due; for among all the wise ones of the nations and in all their kingdoms there is none like you.

cnv.text: 萬國的王啊！誰敢不敬畏你呢？ 這是你應得的。 因為在列國所有的智慧人中， 以及在他們的全國裡， 沒有可以跟你相比的。

ccb.text: 万国的王啊，谁不敬畏你？ 敬畏你是理所当然的。 因为万国的智者和君王中无人能与你相比。
